scenarios.label: Pick or pass
scenarios.description: Seat 4 holds AD, 7S, QC, AH, QH, 8H and must PICK or PASS. (This seat goes on to pick.)

scenarios.label: Call a partner
scenarios.description: Seat 4 picked and now holds AD, 7S, QC, AH, QH, 8H, 8C, 10C (8 cards after the blind). It must choose a partner card — the two-tower CALL scorer is the live head here.

scenarios.label: Bury two cards
scenarios.description: Seat 4 (the picker) holds AD, 7S, QC, AH, QH, 8H, 8C, 10C and must bury its first card — the pointer head scores every hand slot.

scenarios.label: Lead trick 1
scenarios.description: Seat 1 (a defender) leads trick 1 with 10D, 8S, AC, KD, KH, QS. The trick is empty; memory now carries the pick phase.

scenarios.label: Follow late in the hand
scenarios.description: Trick 3: seat 3 (a defender) follows with KC, JH, JD, 9H after several cards hit the table. Trick tokens are live and the memory token carries every completed trick.
